case_title: MANBUJEN PATEL VS. FLOR BE CHUC et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, MANBUJEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUC, FLOR BE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 30TH STREET, #30, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94110, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20.47 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, MANBUJEN
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHUC, FLOR BE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHUC, FLOR BE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, MANBUJEN SERVED JUN-16-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHUC, FLOR BE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, MANBUJEN AS TO DEFENDANT CHUC, FLOR BE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, MANBUJEN AS TO DEFENDANT CHUC, FLOR BE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHUC, FLOR BE
